title: Resin Brick Recipe
description: Now craft your own resin brick
body:
🧱 Resin Brick Recipe Datapack  
Craft sticky structure—no smelter science required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for Resin Bricks, combining natural resin with standard bricks for modded or lore-rich builds.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 1 Brick + 1 Resin Clump  
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with organic materials and alchemical construction  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.4+
